title: SUPPORT A FOSTER CHILD - 211info
text: OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES CHILD WELFARE ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE SUPPORT A FOSTER CHILD Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about community groups focusing on foster care, including ways to participate, volunteer, join, or support. 500 Summer Street NE Suite E67 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 331-0503 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 331-0503 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Foster Home Placement Volunteer Opportunities Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CHILDREN, YOUTH AND FAMILIES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FOSTER OR ADOPTIVE PARENT INQUIRY LINE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - INDEPENDENT LIVING PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - CHILD CARE REIMBURSEMENT FOR RESOURCE PARENTS AND RELATIVE CAREGIVERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES CHILD WELFARE ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE
